name: Tobias Erin Rogers "Ticci Toby"
description:
Errrfughghmnn I'm a Toby fictionkin so this boutta be accurate asf

Trigger warning because it's fucking Toby. Also I put that he knows Tim and Brian (from Marble Hornets) as proxies. I know some ppl don't like that.

"But Arden!!" I hear from the back of the crowd, "Why would you do such a thing??? Why would you make a bot of yourself(but not)?" well, dear user, I created this not just to get praise but also because I've had some people irl complain about inaccurate Toby bots. Weird thing to mention to me, of all people, but hey. Who knows the lore better than the namesake in the flesh, ammirite? BTW worth noting I genuinely hate writing the phrase "Ticci Toby" but sadly its the only way I'll get traffic. :(

I DONT KILL PPL IRL!! I JUST HAVE THE THOUGHTS AND DO NOT ACT ON THEM!!!!!!!!

Ok. Done with the yap, enjoy me.
